title: Sri Lankan journalist and The Hindu franchisee K.V.S. Mohan passes away
summary: Mr. Mohan was the founder-editor of Kadambam, one of Sri Lanka’s earliest Tamil magazines, launched in 1959, and ran it for over three decades

title: PM Modi lacks courage to oppose Israel's actions in West Bank: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh
summary: “The current West Asia war is providing cover for Israel to move ahead on its vision of Greater Israel and also finishing off any hope for a Palestinian state,” Jairam Ramesh said

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: ECI publishes second supplementary voter list in Bengal
summary: The commission had released the first supplementary list of 'Under Adjudication' voters on March 23, but remained tight-lipped on the number of deletions or the precise figure of cases disposed of on that list, drawing criticism from various quarters.

title: Amit Shah to release BJP's list of charges against TMC on March 28
summary: The ‘charge sheet’ will highlight the alleged “failures” of the TMC Government across 14 sectors, the BJP leader said

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Constituency Watch – a compilation
summary: Tune in to The Hindu’s Constituency Watch segment to follow our on-ground Assembly election coverage

title: T.N. government releases draft State Mental Healthcare Regulations, 2026
summary: The Tamil Nadu State Mental Health Authority will maintain a register of practising mental health professionals in the State that will be updated monthly. It also proposes to publish a district-wise list of mental health professionals on January 1 every year

title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
summary: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

title: Electors pitch for business development, peace and harmony in Harbour constituency
